''This page is about the relic, Ranjyatai Incense. For the game mechanic and consumable item, see [[Incense]].''

{{CargoRelic
|name=Ranjyatai Incense
|rank=Blue
|affct=FTH
|birthday=04-24
|source=Lottery Machine (0.07%), Wishing (2.1%), Novice Scrolls (1%)
|description=On Apr 24, AD 756, Empress Komyo presented the Ranjyatai to Todai-ji. Since then, it has been kept there for 1,300 years. 

This incense wood is preserved in Todai-ji. It is about 16 cm long and weighs 26 catties. It is a type of fragrant yellow-brown, containing naimuxinal and exudes a fragrance of orchids. As a precious national treasure collected by the royal family, it is known as the most fragrant wood in the world. 

[Usage]

Ashikaga Yoshimasa, September of the second year of Kansho, about 7.7 cm burnt.

General Oda, March of the second year of Tensho, about 7 cm burnt. 

Politician Tokugawa, June of the seventh year of Keicho, about 7 cm burnt.
|fame=30
|art=28
|fth=45
|civ=23
|tech=28
|ss1=In any Realm, Demon Cells gained +1%
|ss2=In any Realm, Demon Cells gained +2%
|ss3=In any Realm, Demon Cells gained +3%
|ss4=In any Realm, Demon Cells gained +5%
|ss7=In any Realm, Demon Cells gained +5%<br>In any Realm, Demon Cells gained +5%
|skill1=[[File:Yamato skill I.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, FTH Checks -5
}}

[[Category:Demon Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Zombie Gene Boost]]
[[Category:Demon Gene Boost]]
[[Category:Wraith Boost]]
[[Category:Little Monk Boost]]
